title: Civveo
subtitle: HYPERLOCAL DISCOVERY
description: A local alternative to Blinkit/Amazon helping users discover local products. Shark Tank India pitch ready.

title: Ramazaan Tracker
subtitle: A digital companion for tracking daily Ramadan Amaal
description: A mobile app designed to help Muslims stay consistent with their daily Amaal during Ramadan. Users can track acts of worship, monitor their spiritual progress, and build better consistency throughout the holy month.

title: Be;coming
subtitle: PRIVATE JOURNALING
description: A Flutter-based digital diary focused on privacy and personal growth.

title: Streacly
subtitle: Tracking & Analytics
description: A time tracking and analytics app built with Flutter and Localstorage.

title: Portyours
subtitle: Portfolio website templates
description: A collection of modern, responsive portfolio website templates built with React and Tailwind CSS.

title: Amtics AI
subtitle: RAG-based academic chatbot with admin knowledge management
description: An AI-powered academic chatbot that answers student queries using institutional documents. Built with a RAG pipeline, the system retrieves information from uploaded PDFs and files. Administrators can manage and update the knowledge base through an integrated admin dashboard.
